canvas.title: Notes canvas
canvas.subtitle: Quick notes for this site
canvas.clearText: Everything on this site's canvas will be permanently deleted.
canvas.quickEmpty: Quick notes for this site. Add text, a sticky note, a link or an image with the buttons below.

popup.unavailable: Overlayer is not available on this page

image.title: Add image

options.title: Overlayer Settings
options.subtitle: A notes canvas and highlighter for any website — fully offline
options.selectionButtonHint: Show a small highlight button next to selected text
options.highlighterBadgeHint: Round button on pages that have highlights
options.pagesHint: All canvases and pages with highlights
options.dataHint: A backup is the only way to move your notes to another device
options.exportHint: Save all notes and settings to a JSON file
options.importHint: Restore notes and settings from a JSON backup
options.importError: Could not import the file: invalid format
options.clearAllText: All notes and settings will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
options.offlineNote: All data is stored locally on your device
